Table DCS_CODEUSAGE

Card of table DCS_CODEUSAGE

Name

DCS_CODEUSAGE

Code

DCS_CODEUSAGE

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table DCS_CODEUSAGE

---------------------- Pseudocode ----------------------------------

 

 

 

1. Initialize a new table in the Presentation Layer in "DB_CONS_PL_(env)" under "PL_MARKETING" schema

called "DCS_CODEUSAGE".

 

2. Define the Columns, based on the script provided.

Consider the data type for Implementation -

Text as varchar(16777216)

Integer as Number(38,0)

Date&Time as Timestamp

 

3. Define the Constraints

Primary Key (Unique Record Identifier):

DCS_CODEUSAGE_KEY = MD5(Concatenation of(ID, MARKET_CODE,VALID_FROM))

 

 

4. Save the table definition.

 

5. Maintain Data Dictionary

i. Add the column description to each column (from Comment tab in PD).

ii. Mention the Data Classification & PII category for each column and mask them as per standard guideline.

 

6. The data in the atrget object must stay deduplicated.

 

7. Follow the Entity & Attribute level Business Rules defined.

 

8. Run the RLS specific script based on the MARKET_CODE (applicable for QAS & Prod).

 

9.Use "__WRITE_TS" to set up record validity to maintain history (VALID_FROM, VALID_TO)

 

 

 

 

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------- Load Type -----------------------------------------------------------------

SCD2

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

 

 


Check constraint name of the table DCS_CODEUSAGE

CKT_DCS_CODEUSAGE


Server validation rule of the table DCS_CODEUSAGE

%RULES%


Code preview of the table DCS_CODEUSAGE

drop table DCS_CODEUSAGE cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: DCS_CODEUSAGE
--==============================================================
create or replace table PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE (
DCS_CODEUSAGE_KEY TEXT not null,
DCS_USER_KEY TEXT not null,
ID TEXT not null,
CLAIMANT_EMAIL TEXT,
CLAIMANT_FIRSTNAME TEXT,
CLAIMANT_LASTNAME TEXT,
CLAIMANT_DCSID TEXT,
CODE TEXT,
USAGE_DATE INTEGER,
GRANTEE_EMAIL TEXT,
GRANTEE_FIRSTNAME TEXT,
GRANTEE_LASTNAME TEXT,
GRANTEE_DCSID TEXT,
WALLET_NAME TEXT,
CAMPAIGN_NAME TEXT,
REFERRAL_CAMPAIGN TEXT,
DEVICEID TEXT,
MARKET_CODE TEXT not null,
constraint PK_DCS_CODEUSAGE primary key (DCS_CODEUSAGE_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE.DCS_CODEUSAGE_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE.DCS_USER_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE.ID is
'Device identifier (guid). ';

comment on column PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE.CLAIMANT_EMAIL is
'Claimant email - claimant is the person who claimed the code';

comment on column PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE.CLAIMANT_FIRSTNAME is
'Claimant first name';

comment on column PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE.CLAIMANT_LASTNAME is
'Claimant last name';

comment on column PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE.CLAIMANT_DCSID is
'Claimant dcsid ';

comment on column PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE.CODE is
'Code';

comment on column PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE.USAGE_DATE is
'Usage date';

comment on column PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE.GRANTEE_EMAIL is
'Granteee mail';

comment on column PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE.GRANTEE_FIRSTNAME is
'Grantee first name';

comment on column PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE.GRANTEE_LASTNAME is
'Grantee last name';

comment on column PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE.GRANTEE_DCSID is
'Grantee DcsId';

comment on column PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE.WALLET_NAME is
'Wallet name';

comment on column PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE.CAMPAIGN_NAME is
'Campaign name';

comment on column PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE.REFERRAL_CAMPAIGN is
'Campaign name of referral possibly';

comment on column PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE.DEVICEID is
'Device Identifier on UDD';

comment on column PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE.MARKET_CODE is
'Identifier for the Market -> 2 letter Country Code + ''04''';

alter table PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE
add constraint FK_DCS_CODE_R43_USER__DCS_USER foreign key (DCS_USER_KEY)
references PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER (DCS_USER_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE
add constraint FK_DCS_CODE_R44_GRANT_DCS_USER foreign key (CLAIMANT_DCSID)
references PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER (DCS_USER_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE
add constraint FK_DCS_CODE_R45_CLAIM_DCS_USER foreign key (GRANTEE_DCSID)
references PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER (DCS_USER_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;
